costComponents.notes: Internal labour cost per effort unit (below customer-facing base rate in effort-pricing.json). Hourly fields support manual time tracking when not using units.

accessories.notes: When you source trims for the customer, bill at supplier cost × (1 + markup). Margin check uses supplier cost in total cost; customer line includes markup.

overhead.notes: Rent, utilities, admin, tools — applied to labour (at internal cost) + accessories at supplier cost.

lowMarginWatchNotes: Rush or peak jobs quoted without the surcharges in dynamic-pricing.json
Discounts beyond the staff adjustment band in pricing.json
Complexity or rework underestimated after intake
Accessories sourced at cost without agreed markup

optimization.notes: Revisit internal labour rates when wages or productivity shift; adjust base rate and effort factors together (see EFFORT_BASED_PRICING.md).
